about.title: [TR:zh] Making Housing <accessible>Accessible</accessible> for All Nigerians
about.description: [TR:zh] We are on a mission to solve one of Nigeria's challenges: the burden of annual rent payments. Through innovative financing solutions, we are helping thousands of Nigerians find and afford their dream homes.

story.title: [TR:zh] Our Story
story.p1: [TR:zh] In 2021, our founders experienced firsthand the struggle of paying annual rent in Lagos. Despite having good jobs and steady income, coming up with millions of naira upfront felt impossible.
story.p2: [TR:zh] They realized millions of Nigerians face the same challenge every year. The traditional rental system was broken - landlords wanted their money upfront, but tenants could not always provide it.
story.p3: [TR:zh] Shelterflex was born to bridge this gap. We pay landlords upfront while allowing tenants to spread their payments over months. It is a win-win that is transforming how Nigerians rent homes.
story.quote: [TR:zh] We believe everyone deserves a place to call home, regardless of their ability to pay upfront.

peopleFirst.title: [TR:zh] People First
peopleFirst.description: [TR:zh] We believe everyone deserves a home. Our solutions are designed to make housing accessible to all Nigerians.

transparency.title: [TR:zh] Transparency
transparency.description: [TR:zh] No hidden fees, no surprises. We believe in clear, honest communication with our customers.

empathy.title: [TR:zh] Empathy
empathy.description: [TR:zh] We understand the challenges of renting in Nigeria. Our team has lived these experiences.

excellence.title: [TR:zh] Excellence
excellence.description: [TR:zh] We are committed to providing the best possible experience for both tenants and landlords.

m2021.title: [TR:zh] Founded
m2021.description: [TR:zh] Shelterflex was born from a simple idea: make renting easier.

m2022.title: [TR:zh] First 1,000 Tenants
m2022.description: [TR:zh] Helped our first thousand Nigerians access housing.

m2024.title: [TR:zh] 10,000+ Tenants
m2024.description: [TR:zh] Reached a major milestone in impact.

cta.title: [TR:zh] Ready to Join the Shelterflex Family?
cta.description: [TR:zh] Whether you are a tenant looking for flexible payments or a landlord wanting guaranteed income, we have got you covered.

contact.title: [TR:zh] Get in Touch
contact.description: [TR:zh] Have questions? We'd love to hear from you.

form.title: [TR:zh] Send us a Message
form.successDescription: [TR:zh] We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
form.failedDescription: [TR:zh] Please fix the errors below and try again.
form.failedGeneric: [TR:zh] Failed to send message. Please try again.

info.title: [TR:zh] Contact Information
info.responseTimeDesc: [TR:zh] We typically respond within 24 hours during business days. For urgent matters, please call us directly.
info.needHelpDesc: [TR:zh] Check our FAQ or knowledge base for instant answers to common questions.
